response.justification: Strong individual contributor with broad full-stack experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling), but the resume does not demonstrate the executive-level profile this CTO role requires. There is no evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+, no senior technical leadership track record, no production multi-agent AI systems, and no fintech-infrastructure or regulated-environment experience. The candidate appears 1-2 levels below the seniority bar.
strengths: Recent hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Broad polyglot backend/distributed-systems experience (Node, TypeScript, DLang microservices at Sociomantic handling millions of req/s)
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) and a history of teaching/mentoring
concerns: No executive or senior technical-leadership experience — titles cap at Staff/Senior IC with no team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation pipelines, or model-agnostic agent architecture experience demonstrated
No fintech-infrastructure, credit/risk, or regulated-environment background despite being a core requirement

key_factors.factor: Missing executive leadership & team scaling experience
No production multi-agent AI systems track record
